extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ attacked final climb with 2km to go in extreme winds, winning sprint by bike length over GEOGHEGAN HART to take 10 bonus seconds and race lead.
tactical_patterns: CARUSO solo bridge attempt created 23-second gap before MAS counterattack, revealing Movistar preemptive aggression before summit.
ROGLIČ converted 6-second deficit to 4-second lead purely via 10-second time bonus, showing bonus hunting paramount on balanced GC.
BORA-HANSGROHE controlled chase all day defending KÄMNA's jersey, forcing Jumbo-Visma to react rather than dictate throughout.
Extreme wind (80kph gusts) prevented sprint teams organizing, creating opportunistic climbing sprint finish favoring GC riders.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: timed mountaintop sprint perfectly in chaotic wind conditions, demonstrating superior positioning and explosive power
rider_signals.GEOGHEGAN HART Tao: positive: aggressive late move and near-victory suggests form rebuild, bike-length from stage win despite no GC pressure
rider_signals.MAS Enric: positive: initiated decisive selection despite struggling on descents earlier, showed willingness to attack without teammate support
rider_signals.CARUSO Damiano: positive: solo bridge created 23-second gap working for teammates, demonstrates exceptional diesel strength in extreme conditions
rider_signals.KÄMNA Lennard: neutral: defended leader's jersey passively through team control rather than personal aggression on summit
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: neutral: finished with leaders maintaining 12-second GC position but no offensive action despite white jersey threat
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: neutral: closed gaps for ROGLIČ but showed no independent GC ambition despite only 6-second starting deficit
rider_signals.MCNULTY Brandon: neutral: maintained 17-second GC deficit passively, UAE focused entirely on YATES rather than his own chances
